faqPage.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.intro: Find answers to common questions about booking, pickup, payments, and more. If you don't find what you're looking for, our support team is here to help.
faqPage.bookOrHost: Book your next trip or become a host

reserve.question: How do I reserve a vehicle?
reserve.answer: Search by location and dates, choose a rental class or car sharing listing, and complete checkout with hosted payments. Your reservation is confirmed instantly.

airportPickup.question: Do you offer airport pickup?
airportPickup.answer: Yes. Most of our locations are airport-ready with designated pickup hubs. You'll receive clear pickup instructions after booking.

cardDeposits.question: What about deposits and payment?
cardDeposits.answer: All payments are processed through our secure, PCI-compliant hosted payment system. A deposit may be collected at booking, with the remaining balance due at pickup.

rentalVsSharing.question: What's the difference between rentals and car sharing?
rentalVsSharing.answer: Rentals are fleet-backed vehicles managed by Ride Fleet operations. Car sharing listings are hosted by independent owners and managed through our platform with trip protection and hosted payments.

afterHours.question: Can I pick up or return after hours?
afterHours.answer: Availability varies by location. Check your booking confirmation for specific pickup and return windows. Some hosts offer flexible scheduling.

documents.question: What documents do I need?
documents.answer: You'll need a valid driver's license, a credit or debit card in your name, and you must meet the minimum age requirement (usually 21+). International licenses are accepted at most locations.

cancellation.question: What is the cancellation policy?
cancellation.answer: Rental bookings can be cancelled free of charge up to 48 hours before pickup. Car sharing bookings offer free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup. Late cancellations may incur a fee.

bookingConfidence.title: Booking confidence
bookingConfidence.body: Transparent pricing, instant confirmation, and hosted payments so you know exactly what you're paying before you commit.

arrivalReadiness.title: Arrival readiness
arrivalReadiness.body: Clear pickup instructions, airport hub locations, and real-time coordination so your vehicle is ready when you land.

marketplaceClarity.title: Marketplace clarity
marketplaceClarity.body: Understand the difference between fleet rentals and car sharing, coverage options, and what's included in every booking.

aboutPage.heroTitle: Premium mobility, powered by real operations
aboutPage.heroSubtitle: Ride combines airport-ready rentals, curated car sharing, and a modern digital booking experience — all backed by Ride Fleet's reservation system, hosted payments, and guest support infrastructure.
aboutPage.ourStoryP1: Ride started with a simple observation: renting a car shouldn't feel like a chore. Traditional rental counters are slow, opaque, and frustrating. Peer-to-peer platforms can feel risky and unreliable. We set out to build something better.
aboutPage.ourStoryP2: By combining fleet-backed operations with a curated car sharing marketplace, Ride offers two booking lanes under one premium experience. Every transaction uses hosted payments, every booking includes trip protection, and every pickup is designed around how travelers actually arrive.
aboutPage.ourStoryP3: Today, Ride serves guests across Puerto Rico, Miami, Orlando, Fort Lauderdale, Los Angeles, and Ecuador — with more cities launching soon. Whether you're renting for a week or sharing a car for a weekend, the experience is the same: clear, confident, and premium.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.body: No hidden fees, no bait-and-switch. You see exactly what you'll pay before you book.

airportReliability.title: Airport reliability
airportReliability.body: Our pickup flows are designed around airport arrivals — with designated hubs, clear instructions, and real-time coordination.

hostEmpowerment.title: Host empowerment
hostEmpowerment.body: We give car sharing hosts the tools, support, and platform to earn on their own terms.

guestConfidence.title: Guest confidence
guestConfidence.body: Trip protection, verified vehicles, and hosted payments on every booking — so guests can travel with peace of mind.

technology.title: Technology-first
technology.body: Digital agreements, real-time chat, inspection photos, and a fully online booking flow — no paper, no lines, no friction.

termsPage.heading: Terms of Service

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: Ride Car Sharing ("Ride," "we," "us," or "our") operates a peer-to-peer car sharing marketplace platform. Ride is NOT a car rental company, insurance provider, or transportation carrier. We do not own, operate, maintain, inspect, or insure any vehicles. We are a technology marketplace that facilitates connections between independent vehicle owners ("Hosts") and renters ("Guests"). By using our platform, you agree to these Terms, including the binding arbitration clause and class action waiver.

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.body:
Guests: Must be 21+ with a valid, unrestricted driver's license. Guests aged 21-24 pay a $15/day young driver surcharge. International licenses accepted with valid passport.

Hosts: Must be 21+, legal owner of the vehicle, maintain active auto insurance meeting state minimums (PR: SRO; FL: 10/20/10; CA: 15/30/5; NY: 25/50/10; TX: 30/60/25), notify insurer of P2P sharing, and list vehicles 15 years old or newer with under 150,000 miles.

booking.title: Booking and Reservations
booking.body: Reservations are subject to availability and may require a deposit at the time of booking. Ride reserves the right to modify or cancel reservations due to unforeseen circumstances.

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.body:
Guest: Free cancellation up to 48 hours before pickup. 24-48 hours: 50% of first day's rate. Under 24 hours: 100% of first day's rate. No-shows: full trip amount charged.

Host: 1st cancel = warning. 2nd in 90 days = $50 fee. 3rd = $100 + 30-day search suppression. 4th+ = account review/suspension. Guests receive compensation: one day's rate for 2+ day trips, half day for shorter trips.

payment.title: Payment and Pricing
payment.body:
Payment is processed through our secure hosted payment system. Total includes: base daily rate, platform service fee (10%), Trip Protection fee (if selected), optional add-ons, delivery fee (if applicable), cleaning fee (if applicable), and taxes.

Security Deposit: $250 refundable hold at booking (host may set up to $500). Released within 48 hours of clean return.

Late Return: 30-minute grace period. After: $25/hour. 2+ hours late: full extra day at daily rate. 6+ hours with no communication: security deposit forfeited.

Mileage: 200 miles/day included (host may set different limit). Excess: $0.35/mile.

Fuel: Return at same level. Shortage: $5/gallon + $25 refueling fee. EV: $0.30/kWh + $15 charging fee.

Tolls: With Toll Pass add-on ($3.50/day): unlimited toll usage. Without: tolls charged by plate match + $5 admin fee per toll (up to 90 days post-trip).

vehicleUse.title: Vehicle Use
vehicleUse.body:
Only the registered guest may drive. Prohibited: off-road driving, racing, towing, commercial use, smoking/vaping (unless listing permits), pets (unless listing permits), driving under influence, illegal activity. Must comply with all traffic laws. Must return at agreed time and location.

Cleaning fees: Light $30, Medium $75, Heavy $150, Severe $250. Smoking violation: $250. Unauthorized pets: $150.

Violation of any restriction immediately voids Trip Protection and may result in full financial liability, security deposit forfeiture, and account suspension.

insurance.title: Trip Protection Program
insurance.body:
THE TRIP PROTECTION PROGRAM IS NOT INSURANCE. It is a limited contractual reimbursement program.

Basic (Free): No reimbursement. Guest pays all damages. Host files with own insurer.
Standard ($12/day): Ride reimburses host's insurance deductible up to $1,000.
Premium ($22/day): Ride reimburses host's insurance deductible up to $2,500.

HOST REIMBURSEMENT: When a Guest selects Standard or Premium, Ride reimburses the host's insurance deductible only — the amount the host's insurer charges before covering the repair. We do NOT pay repair costs directly.

NOT COVERED (all tiers): Tires, glass/windshield, wear and tear, mechanical breakdown, interior damage from normal use, personal property, liability to others, unauthorized drivers, off-road/illegal use, pre-existing damage.

OPTIONAL ADD-ONS (sold separately if host offers): Tire Protection ($5/day), Glass Protection ($4/day), Roadside Assistance ($6/day), Toll Pass ($3.50/day).

IF HOST LACKS VALID INSURANCE: Ride is NOT responsible for any damage and no deductible reimbursement will be made.

hostResponsibilities.title: Host Responsibilities
hostResponsibilities.body:
Hosts must: maintain auto insurance meeting state minimums, notify insurer of P2P sharing, keep vehicle in safe/roadworthy condition, provide accurate descriptions and photos, be available during pickup/return, report known issues.

HOST INDEMNIFICATION: Hosts agree to indemnify Ride against all claims arising from vehicle condition, operation, maintenance, insurance gaps, or breach of these Terms. This includes attorneys' fees and costs.

Ride does NOT verify or guarantee any host's insurance coverage.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute Resolution
disputeResolution.body:
Informal Resolution: Contact support@ride-carsharing.com. Allow 30 days for resolution.

Accident Procedure: Ensure safety → photos of all damage → exchange info → report in Trip Chat within 1 hour → police report if damage exceeds $500 → DO NOT admit fault → contact personal insurer within 24 hours.

Binding Arbitration: Unresolved disputes settled through binding individual arbitration under AAA rules.

CLASS ACTION WAIVER: Each party may bring claims only individually, not as plaintiff or class member in any class action.

Governing Law: Commonwealth of Puerto Rico.

Data Usage: All messages, photos, inspection images, GPS data, and trip activity may be used as evidence in claims and disputes.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body:
RIDE SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES. RIDE'S TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF: (A) PLATFORM FEES PAID IN THE PRECEDING 12 MONTHS, OR (B) $100.

YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT RIDE DOES NOT PROVIDE INSURANCE AND THAT TRIP PROTECTION IS A LIMITED CONTRACTUAL BENEFIT. YOU ASSUME ALL RISK ASSOCIATED WITH USING THE PLATFORM.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.body: Your use of Ride is subject to our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information. By using Ride, you consent to the practices described therein.

changes.title: Changes to Terms
changes.body: Ride reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Material changes will be communicated via email or through the platform. Continued use of the service constitutes acceptance of updated terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For questions about these Terms of Service, please contact our support team through the Contact page or email us directly.

termsPage.importantNotice: IMPORTANT: By using Ride Car Sharing, you agree to these Terms, including the binding arbitration clause and class action waiver. Please read carefully.

becomeAHost.documentsAndListingDesc: Upload required documents and write your listing description. Photos and insurance are required to go live.
becomeAHost.clickOrDragPhotos: Click or drag to add photos
becomeAHost.photosHint: Up to 6 photos — exterior, interior, and trunk recommended
becomeAHost.docInspectionHint: Photo or PDF of pre-listing inspection
becomeAHost.downloadChecklistHint: Print this checklist and complete it before submitting your vehicle. All items must pass for approval.
becomeAHost.inspectionNotesHint: Anything the review team should know before approval
becomeAHost.inspectionNotesPlaceholder: Scratch on rear bumper noted prior to listing. All systems functional.
becomeAHost.shortDescriptionHint: One line shown in search results
becomeAHost.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Clean SUV with airport-friendly pickup in Isla Verde
becomeAHost.fullDescriptionHint: Tell guests what makes your car a great choice
becomeAHost.fullDescriptionPlaceholder: My 2021 Toyota Camry is meticulously maintained and detailed before every trip. Perfect for business travelers and families...
becomeAHost.tripRulesPlaceholder: No smoking · No pets · Return with full tank
becomeAHost.signInToHostApp: Sign in to the host app →
becomeAHost.valPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
becomeAHost.valPhotos: Please upload at least one vehicle photo.

chatRoom.instructionsPlaceholder: Meet at the parking lot by Terminal B. Look for the white Toyota...
chatRoom.chatTranscriptAttached: The full chat transcript will be attached to the ticket automatically.
chatRoom.describeIssuePlaceholder: What happened? Be specific so our support team can help...
chatRoom.confirmEndChat: Are you sure you want to end this conversation? This cannot be undone.
